description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games or Home page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action: WHEN a live game has a pitcher who has not allowed a hit to the opposing team and the game has reached the 6th inning - then statsAPI will send a statusCode value of ???
steps.result: THEN a Blue ‘NO HITTER’ tag is presented to user on Hero and Expanded Game Tile (Not present in mini)
